items.name: Gear 5 Luffy +
items.description:
The future pirate king / joy boy himself! Due to Roblox changing the head attachment points on the Riley body, you now have to use the head from this bundle: https://www.roblox.com/bundles/600400/Body-For-Layered-Clothing
For the arms and torso at the very least make sure to use this FREE character bundle by Roblox: https://www.roblox.com/bundles/979/Base-Body-Riley

Get the rest of the outfit!
